MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON FEB-15-2007 IN 206, DEFENDANT RENEE KOZLESKY'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND/OR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WAS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 3/12/07 IS CONTINUED TO 11/5/07 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED AND A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT.
